name: Israel
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **ISRAEL ESCALATED IN BEIRUT MAY 6 — KILLED HEZBOLLAH RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT (FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE); 13 KILLED IN SOUTHERN/EASTERN LEBANON; ISRAELI-CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER REMAINS UNTRIPPED AT DAY 11/14 (EXPIRES MAY 11); HEZBOLLAH HAS NOT RETALIATED.** PM Netanyahu personally announced he ordered the Beirut suburbs strike to 'neutralize' Ballout, operations commander of Hezbollah's Radwan Force. Separately, Israeli airstrikes on southern and eastern Lebanon killed 13+ and wounded a dozen May 5-6, with forced displacement orders for 12 villages — most north of the Litani River, OUTSIDE Israeli military occupation zones, in violation of the US-brokered April 16 ceasefire. **Directional asymmetry remains structural: ALL 13+ casualties Lebanese; ZERO Israeli civilian casualties inside Israel proper this cycle.** Israel is exploiting the diplomatic-track-on-Iran moment to take out high-value Hezbollah targets with minimal blowback risk; Hezbollah's coordination-decay framework (Day 76-77 of Houthi quiet, weak retaliation in Lebanon) holds. **Cabinet dissonance signal:** Times of Israel May 6 live-blog reports 'Netanyahu convenes security cabinet, says he will speak to Trump about Iran developments' — Israeli cabinet may be uncomfortable with Trump pause framework. Pravda Trump claim 'IDF preparing large-scale operation against Iran despite Project Freedom suspension' is REPORTED single-source/Russian adversarial-media chain — NOT confirmed by mainstream Western media; treated as unverified Russia-aligned framing. If MOU signs, Netanyahu's cabinet may publicly oppose — a constraint Trump will need to manage.

active_triggers.condition: Iran strikes Dimona nuclear reactor directly
Channel 12/13 or Haaretz publishes IDF imminent-strike preparation on Iran track within 72 hours

PM Netanyahu personally announced ordering Beirut strike. Day 11/14 of Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger window (expires May 11) — directional asymmetry remains ALL Lebanese casualties, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Cabinet dissonance: Times of Israel reports 'Netanyahu convenes security cabinet, says he will speak to Trump about Iran developments.' Pravda Trump 'IDF preparing large-scale Iran op' = REPORTED single-source/Russian adversarial — NOT verified by mainstream Western, treated as unverified Russia-aligned framing.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED Beirut strike + commander killing (Times of Israel/Haaretz/Al-Monitor/Reuters); CONFIRMED 13+ Lebanese casualties (Al Jazeera primary); CONFIRMED forced-displacement orders for 12 villages; Pravda Trump IDF Iran-op claim explicitly NOT elevated (single-source/Russian adversarial chain)

historical_summaries.summary: 1 signals. Israel's Defense Minister Israel Katz confirmed 'preemptive' strike on Iran
9 signals. IDF launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | US struck Kharg Island | Israel struck South Pars gas field (world's largest)

42 signals. Israel accelerating military campaign alongside peace signals: IDF struck 170 targets 'throughout Tehran' in 24 hours | Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike April 1 | IDF confirmed '170 targets in 24 hours throughout Tehran' on April 1-2
